title: CFTR / ivacaftor
summary: Patients with the rs397508256 AA genotype (two copies of the CFTR E56K variant) and cystic fibrosis may respond to ivacaftor treatment. FDA-approved drug labeling information and CPIC guidelines indicate use of ivacaftor in cystic fibrosis patients with at least one copy of E56K. Other genetic and clinical factors may also influence response to ivacaftor.
